title: Formation Flight streamwise wake attenuation localizer
scientificQuestion: Is the c16-to-c20 wake-amplitude discrepancy already present at the upstream edge of the locked wake ROI, or does it amplify as the wake travels downstream?
commonGridAndMask: map c16 to c20 cell centers; exclude the union of either solid mask plus one c20-cell dilation; use the exact locked phase files
metric: for each phase and band, sum squared c20-c16 signal residual normalized by the larger whole-ROI c16/c20 RMS; divide aggregate band energy by aggregate valid cell count

decisionRule.ifTransportDominated: test a distinct bulk transport model or localized downstream refinement
decisionRule.ifSourceDominated: return to near-wing population generation and boundary-source refinement
decisionRule.ifMixed: measure the phase-resolved source-to-wake transfer across an intermediate control surface

claimBoundary: This center-plane localization is a mechanism selector, not a three-dimensional energy budget. It cannot validate formation benefit or authorize a production solver change.
